query:
UPDATE user_onboarding 
SET current_step = 1, 
    completed = 0, 
    completed_at = NULL, 
    skipped = 0, 
    service_id = NULL, 
    icp_id = NULL, 
    headline_set_id = NULL, 
    campaign_id = NULL,
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE user_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE openId = 'arfeen-khan-open-id' LIMIT 1);
